name: Family Expectation
life_effect: narrows risky branches and increases delayed decision behavior

name: Labor Market
life_effect: rewards prepared action but punishes endless hesitation

name: City Pressure
pressure_style: living cost, social comparison, time compression
life_effect: increases urgency and makes rest feel like falling behind

name: Support Network
desire: reality testing, emotional support, honest reflection
pressure_style: feedback, witnessing, rescue from private rumination
life_effect: reduces distortion and helps convert insight into action

name: Energy System
life_effect: can make exhaustion look like destiny or lack of will

name: Asset Constraint
pressure_style: monthly burn, debt pressure, savings limit
life_effect: determines whether a branch can be explored safely or only imagined
